title: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp excels as an all-in-one solution for beginners and small businesses, while Campaign Monitor specializes in serving agencies and teams managing multiple brands. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals and budget.
choose_a_if: You're just starting out and want a free option to test email marketing
You need landing pages, e-commerce integration, and basic automation in one platform
You're managing a single brand or small business with a limited budget
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts and need white-label capabilities
You require advanced journey designer and smart segmentation features
You're an agency looking for professional-grade email automation and transactional email support

faq.q: Is Mailchimp better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Neither is universally 'better'—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp is superior for beginners and small businesses due to its free tier and all-in-one features, while Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands with its specialized tools. Mailchimp also has significantly better G2 ratings (4.3 vs 4.1), while Campaign Monitor has stronger Trustpilot reviews (3.2 vs 1.5).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Mailchimp is cheaper overall because it offers a robust free tier supporting up to 500 subscribers, making it ideal for startups and testing. Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month with no free option. However, if you're past the free tier, both platforms have comparable pricing, with Mailchimp starting at $13/month.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching is straightforward. Most email marketing platforms, including Mailchimp, allow you to import your subscriber lists and export campaign history. Campaign Monitor provides data export options, making migration relatively painless. You may need to rebuild automation workflows, but your core contact data will transfer easily.
